همر.meaning: to pour, to flow, to rain

همز.meaning: to prod, to blame, to backbite

همن.meaning: to watch over, to protect, guardian

هود.meaning: To return, become a Jew, repent

هور.meaning: To return, to argue, to change

وتر.meaning: odd, to make odd, to cut

وثق.meaning: to trust, to be firm, to covenant

وجد.meaning: To find, to exist, to feel

وجل.meaning: to fear, to be afraid, to hesitate

ورد.meaning: To come, to reach, to descend

وري.meaning: to hide, to cover, to ignite

وزع.meaning: To distribute, to divide, to inspire

وزن.meaning: to weigh, to measure, to balance

وسق.meaning: to gather, to load, to carry

وسل.meaning: to approach, to make a means

وشي.meaning: to adorn, to embroider, to gossip

وصل.meaning: To reach, to connect, to unite

وضع.meaning: To place, to put, to lay down

وطأ.meaning: to step on, to flatten, to make suitable

وعد.meaning: To promise, to give a word

وفد.meaning: To send a delegation, to come

وفر.meaning: To be abundant, to be sufficient

وقد.meaning: To ignite, to kindle, to blaze

وقف.meaning: to stop, to halt, to make wait

وكز.meaning: to strike, to punch, to poke

وكل.meaning: to appoint as a trustee, to trust

ولد.meaning: to be born, to give birth, child

وني.meaning: To slacken, to weaken, to tire

يتم.meaning: to be an orphan, to be left without kin

يقظ.meaning: to be awake, to be alert, vigilant

يقن.meaning: to know with certainty, to be certain

يمم.meaning: To head towards, to intend, to perform tayammum (dry ablution)
